S.FORM: Cedric Ball sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Cedric Ball, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Ball htgan na ryax maki masacusanco ustus. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®e*ri ¶~ ® Œ≤all s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®e*ri ¶~ ® Œ≤all, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. qnxan nja Œ≤all ƒßt…£an na rjax maki mas~…ïa ¶~ ®us~…ïan ¶~ ®o us~…ïtus~…ï. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
S.FORM: Cedric Ball sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Cedric Ball, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Ball htgan na ryax maki masacusanco ustus. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
